stemHtml: For an increase in speed slightly above the drag divergence Mach number...

options.a: drag increases due to the slow growth of a shockwave leading to boundary layer separation.
options.b: drag increases due to the rapid growth of a shockwave leading to boundary layer separation.
options.c: drag decreases due to smoother shock transition on the upper surface.
options.d: drag decreases due to the rearward movement of the shockwaves.
